message:
fix: eliminate ambient authority violations and update trybuild expectations

- connection.rs: Replace Instant::now() with logical gc_clock_millis counter
  for deterministic GC scheduling without ambient time authority

- connection.rs: Return not_implemented error for VACUUM INTO instead of
  using std::fs::copy (violates non-vfs ambient authority rule)

- gc.rs: Change GcScheduler API from Instant to u64 milliseconds, update
  tests to use new millisecond-based API

- Update trybuild stderr expectations to include SimplePagerCheckpointWriter<V>
  in sealed trait implementation lists

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
